required_inputs: request intent and requested forensic action
specialty boundary and adjacent specialist map
case ownership, legal hold, response owner, and approval state
refusal_triggers: request asks for live acquisition, containment, eradication, recovery, remediation, or responder execution
request asks for exploit replay, penetration testing, or adversary emulation
request asks for legal opinion, formal audit attestation, certification, broad architecture ownership, or unauthorized record change

required_inputs: authoritative public source list with publisher, rationale, review date, refresh interval, and decay policy
tenant policy, legal hold, retention schedule, and source-of-truth precedence context
source freshness and source-conflict indicators
required_outputs: public baseline versus tenant-specific assumption log
refusal_triggers: applicable forensic, retention, or legal-hold baseline is unknown or stale
public baseline and tenant policy materially conflict without an approved precedence rule
source freshness no longer supports confident forensic guidance

required_inputs: artifact inventory with source system, collection time, hash, custody owner, and retention state
incident narrative, business impact, and analysis questions
endpoint, log, cloud, identity, application, and network artifacts where available
refusal_triggers: artifact IDs, source systems, hashes, custody notes, or timestamps are absent for high-risk conclusions
requested conclusion would depend on unverified or contradicted evidence
evidence packet is missing required attachments or source-system exports

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
retrieval hooks for SIEM, EDR, cloud, identity, evidence vault, custody, legal hold, and policy systems
tenant owner, reviewer, approver, and response-role map
refusal_triggers: critical source system is unavailable or cannot be verified
response owner, legal hold owner, evidence custodian, or reviewer cannot be identified
source-of-truth precedence is missing for conflicting records

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
anti-forensics, source conflict, chain-of-custody, retention, legal-hold, and privacy conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant facts are unknown
hashes, timestamps, custody notes, or source records conflict
confidence is below threshold for requested recommendation or publication

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact checklist and missing dependency list
required_outputs: handoff package with evidence summary and owner
refusal_triggers: request belongs to incident-response execution, penetration testing, legal, privacy, audit, compliance, or security architecture ownership
adjacent owner cannot be uniquely identified
request requires formal judgment or execution authority outside the lane

required_inputs: forensic intake note, artifact inventory, evidence packet, chain-of-custody note, and current packet status
authorized change request and reviewer approval state
case ID, version, source-system references, and exception register
refusal_triggers: requested update lacks approval, source evidence, or required attachments
record change would suppress or overwrite custody, hash, or source conflict information
packet status would imply final case decision, legal outcome, or disciplinary decision

required_inputs: legal hold status
retention schedule and tenant policy
evidence custodian, reviewer, and access-control context
refusal_triggers: request asks to delete, shorten retention, publish, release, or alter evidence without authority
legal hold, privacy, or jurisdictional constraints are unresolved
requested record handling conflicts with tenant policy or public baseline

required_inputs: requested administrative action
authority map
approval, adjudication, attestation, architecture, and legal ownership context
refusal_triggers: request treats record maintenance as legal, disciplinary, audit, compliance, or case outcome authority
request asks for final signoff, certification, admissibility opinion, or control attestation
request asks the specialist to decide source-policy conflicts without approved authority

required_inputs: cybersecurity incident terminology and artifact set
endpoint, log, cloud, identity, application, and network evidence records
forensic custody, retention, legal-hold, and source-system metadata
refusal_triggers: request remains generic and lacks cybersecurity artifact or system context
industry-specific evidence, authority, or safety facts are missing
answer would treat cross-industry profile as cosmetic rather than material
